title: Autophagy fast
intro: Start a timer-based fast (16:8, 18:6, OMAD, or longer). Water only — your body switches into repair mode after the first chunk of hours.
categoryCardBody: Start the timer and let your body do its own cleanup work.
startBody: Pick a target window. You can end the fast whenever you want — the goal is just to know where you are.
targetReached: Target reached — keep going or end it whenever
liveCountStarted: {n} people started a fast today alongside you
liveCountStartedOne: 1 other person started a fast today

endSheet.title: How are you feeling?
endSheet.body: Before you close this fast, take a moment. Energy, hunger, mood, clarity — what's actually going on right now? This goes into your history so you can spot patterns over time.
endSheet.feelingPlaceholder: Sharper than usual, hungry but steady, calmer in the head…
